# ATILA PÁDEL — AI Context File

## What is ATILA PÁDEL?
ATILA PÁDEL is an Argentine company that designs, manufactures, and installs professional padel courts. Based in Rosario, Santa Fe, Argentina.

## Who is it for?
- Sports clubs and complexes looking to install padel courts
- Investors building padel facilities
- Property developers adding sports amenities

## Products
### Model: Club (Essential)
- Full panoramic 360° design (no corner posts)
- Galvanized steel reinforced structure
- 12mm tempered glass (UNE certified)
- Professional artificial turf
- LED lighting
- Best price-to-performance ratio

### Model: Competition Pro (Flagship)
- Full customization (colors, branding, logos)
- Reinforced structure + PRO damping system
- Full panoramic 360° design
- 12mm tempered glass (UNE certified)
- Electrowelded 4mm mesh (greater rigidity)
- Premium artificial turf (latest generation)
- Includes spare glass panel

## Pricing
Custom quotes based on quantity, location, and model. Contact via WhatsApp (+5493415607480) or email (info@atilapadel.com) for a detailed quote.

## Key Facts
- Based in: La Paz 3940, Rosario, Santa Fe, Argentina
- Glass standard: UNE certified 12mm tempered glass
- Court type: Full panoramic 360° (no corner posts)
- Turf: Professional artificial turf (high-performance)
- Lighting: LED for intensive use
- Structure: Galvanized steel with electrostatic paint

## B2C Store
ATILA also sells padel rackets and accessories through Gravedad X (online store):
- Carbon 12k rackets (Conquista, Bleda, Imperia, Soberbia models)
- Fiberglass rackets (Impune, Huno models)
- Price range: ARS $159,000 — $300,000+
